attestation_levels.self: Self-attested — the vendor declares it and signs for it
attestation_levels.document: Document-verified — McCluster has reviewed the paperwork
attestation_levels.site: Site-verified — McCluster has stood in the room

badges.name: M-Verified Studio
badges.short: The core seal for shoot spaces
badges.meaning: This space has completed the full McCluster verification application — identity, registration, insurance, and published rates — and passed review.
requirements: Completed verification application with all required identifiers
Proof of business registration and insurance
badges.proof: Verification application on file, documents reviewed, rate sheet published on the network page.

badges.name: Full Rig On-Site
badges.short: Lighting and grip live at the space
badges.meaning: The room comes with a working lighting and grip package — strobes, modifiers, stands — included or rentable at the door. You book the room, the loadout is there.
requirements: Rental terms published if not included
badges.proof: Gear inventory submitted with the application and confirmed at review.

badges.name: Cyc Wall Certified
badges.meaning: The space has a true cyclorama wall — seamless, repaired, and repainted on a schedule — not a bedsheet and a prayer.
badges.proof: Dimensions and current-condition photos in the verification file.

badges.name: Natural Light Rated
badges.meaning: The space has documented natural-light conditions — window direction, best hours, and blackout options — so you can plan the shoot before you arrive.
requirements: Window orientation and square footage declared
badges.proof: Light documentation submitted with sample frames.

badges.name: Same-Day Ready
badges.meaning: This space keeps same-day booking windows open and answers inside an hour during business hours.
requirements: Live calendar or booking contact published
badges.proof: Response times spot-checked by the network.

badges.name: Published Rates
badges.meaning: The full price sheet is public on the network — hourly, half-day, full-day, and what's included. No quote games.
requirements: Rates published on the network listing
badges.proof: Rate sheet on the vendor's network page.

badges.name: Insured Space
badges.meaning: The space carries current general liability insurance and provided the certificate during verification.
badges.proof: Certificate of insurance reviewed at verification.

badges.name: Client Lounge
badges.short: Somewhere for the client to land
badges.meaning: There's a dedicated client area — seating, wifi, coffee or water — separate from the working set.
badges.proof: Photos in the verification file.

badges.name: Gear Locker On-Site
badges.meaning: Lockable, secure storage for client gear during multi-day bookings — cameras stay, nerves rest.
badges.proof: Storage terms in the vendor agreement.

badges.name: McCluster Approved
badges.meaning: Matthew McCluster has personally worked in or walked this space and signs his name on it. The highest tier — not bought, earned.
requirements: A completed production or a site visit by McCluster
Standing record of straight dealing with the network
badges.proof: Site visit or production on record.

badges.name: M-Verified Room
badges.short: The core seal for recording rooms
badges.meaning: This studio has completed the full McCluster verification application — identity, registration, insurance, published day rates — and passed review.
requirements: Completed verification application with required identifiers
badges.proof: Verification application on file and reviewed.

badges.name: Engineer Available
badges.short: A real engineer comes with the room
badges.meaning: A working engineer is bookable with the session — credits on file, rates published. You're not renting silence, you're renting a take.
badges.proof: Engineer credits in the verification file.

badges.name: Tuned Room
badges.meaning: The control room and live room are acoustically treated and the treatment is documented — not egg cartons, engineering.
badges.proof: Room documentation reviewed at verification.

badges.name: Iso Booth Certified
badges.meaning: A dedicated isolation booth with documented noise floor — clean vocals even when the block outside isn't.
requirements: Booth dimensions and treatment on file
badges.proof: Booth documentation in the verification file.

badges.name: Mic Locker
badges.meaning: A published microphone inventory comes with the room — what's in the locker is what's on the listing.
badges.proof: Inventory on the vendor's network page.

badges.name: Console Verified
badges.short: The desk is real and it works
badges.meaning: The console and outboard chain listed on the booking page physically exist, power on, and pass signal — confirmed during verification.
badges.proof: Chain documentation reviewed at verification.

badges.name: Mix & Master On-Site
badges.short: Walk out with a finished record
badges.meaning: The studio offers in-house mixing and mastering with published turnaround times — track it, mix it, master it, one roof.
badges.proof: Service sheet in the verification file.

badges.name: Day Rates In The Open
badges.meaning: Hourly and day rates are published on the network listing — engineer included or itemized, no surprise line items.
badges.proof: Rate sheet on the vendor's network page.

badges.name: Session Ready
badges.meaning: The room is patched, templated, and tested before your downbeat — the session starts when you do, not forty minutes after.
requirements: Setup included in the booked time
badges.proof: Setup policy in the vendor agreement.

badges.name: McCluster Approved
badges.meaning: Matthew McCluster has recorded in or personally inspected this room and signs his name on it. The highest tier — not bought, earned.
requirements: A completed session or site visit by McCluster
Standing record of straight dealing with the network
badges.proof: Session or site visit on record.

badges.name: M-Verified Stage
badges.short: The core seal for event spaces
badges.meaning: This venue has completed the full McCluster verification application — identity, registration, insurance, capacity paperwork — and passed review.
requirements: Completed verification application with required identifiers
badges.proof: Verification application on file and reviewed.

badges.name: Broadcast Ready
badges.short: This room can go to air
badges.meaning: Power, connectivity, and acoustics rated for live broadcast — a show can uplink from this floor tonight.
requirements: Dedicated circuits and power spec on file
Wired internet with declared upload bandwidth
Broadcast history or test on record
badges.proof: Technical spec sheet reviewed at verification.

badges.name: Multicam Certified
badges.short: Built for more than one angle
badges.meaning: Camera positions, sightlines, and cable runs support a multi-camera shoot without rebuilding the room.
badges.proof: Floor plan with camera positions in the verification file.

badges.name: Stream Uplink
badges.meaning: Documented dedicated upload bandwidth and a wired path from the floor to the world — streams don't drop when the audience's phones arrive.
requirements: Dedicated upload bandwidth declared and tested
badges.proof: Bandwidth test results on file.

badges.name: House Audio Rated
badges.short: A PA that tells the truth
badges.meaning: The installed sound system is documented and maintained — coverage, console, and mic package listed so your engineer knows the room before load-in.
requirements: PA and console spec on file
badges.proof: Audio spec sheet in the verification file.

badges.name: Lighting Grid
badges.meaning: A rated overhead grid or truss with house lighting positions — stage looks like a stage, not a conference-room afterthought.
badges.proof: Grid documentation reviewed at verification.

badges.name: Green Room
badges.meaning: A private, secured green room for speakers and performers — mirror, power, private access to the stage.
badges.proof: Photos in the verification file.

badges.name: Capacity Rated
badges.meaning: Current fire-marshal occupancy certificate on file with seated and standing configurations published on the listing.
badges.proof: Occupancy certificate reviewed at verification.

badges.name: Air Tonight
badges.meaning: This venue has proven it can take a call in the morning and put a show on air the same night — crewed, powered, connected.
requirements: Broadcast Ready and Stream Uplink badges current
A completed fast-turn event on record
badges.proof: Fast-turn event on record with the network.

badges.name: McCluster Approved
badges.meaning: Matthew McCluster has produced in or personally walked this venue and signs his name on it. The highest tier — not bought, earned.
requirements: A completed production or site visit by McCluster
Standing record of straight dealing with the network
badges.proof: Production or site visit on record.
